## Bug summary

One sentence: what goes wrong?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Set up bot using xchat-bot-python
2. Do X
3. See Y

## Expected behavior

What should happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens. Include:
- API endpoint called
- Request payload (scrub any real user IDs)
- Response received

## X Developer Forum thread

Link to forum discussion (if any): https://devcommunity.x.com/...

## Workaround

If you found a workaround, describe it here. This becomes the `workaround` field in the repro pack.

## Environment

- X API tier: [Free / Basic / Pro / Enterprise]
- E2EE enabled on conversation: [Yes / No / Unknown]
- xchat-bot-python version / commit:
